creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
On Tue, Jul 13, 2010 at 9:35 AM, Spil Oss <spil.oss@gmail.com> wrote:
> Hi Yongari,
>
> That's a good while back....
>
> Since then I lost the harddisk and the crash-dumps weren't part of my backups.
> Currently not running a bridged network and Windows 7 clients are
> fine. And running 8.0-p3 (via 7.2 upgrade)....
>
> Was contemplating bridging the wired and wireless networks again. I'll
> try and find some time to change my configuration and retest on 8.0-p3
> first to see if I can reproduce it there. Then I'll try reproducing it
> on 8.1-RC3 without and with patch.
>
> Kind regards,
>
> Spil.
>

Hi Yongari,

Enabled bridging wlan0 and bge0 again and cannot reproduce the problem
no longer exists on FreeBSD-8.0-p2. Suggest to close this bug.

Kind regards,
